title: Can a workdoc be moved from one item to another?
excerpt:
I am a new monday.com user. I created a Monday_Doc for a Subitem but I would rather it be connected to the Item - I can’t figure out how to resave it or move it to a different spot. 
Any help is appreciated …

posts.author: Kylee (Kylee Garretson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am a new monday.com user. I created a Monday_Doc for a Subitem but I would rather it be connected to the Item - I can’t figure out how to resave it or move it to a different spot.

Any help is appreciated

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

If you add the workdoc column to the parent item level, you can then search the workdoc name within the attachment selection. Once complete, the nyou can delete the attachment to the subitem attachment.

Hope this helps and if you need any other assistance or training, feel free to reach out as we are here to automate anything in pursuit of a monday.com business hub!

Axanexa
